/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/opensplat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/point_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/nerfstudio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/kdtree_tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/spherical_harmonics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/cv_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/project_gaussians.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/rasterize_gaussians.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/ssim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/optim_scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/colmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/opensfm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/openmvg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/input_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opensplat.dir/tensor_math.cpp.o -o opensplat  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/bc/libtorch/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libgsplat_cpu.a libgsplat.a /Users/bc/libtorch/lib/libc10.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_highgui.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.13.0.dylib -lpthread -framework Foundation -framework Metal -framework MetalKit /Users/bc/libtorch/lib/libtorch.dylib /Users/bc/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.dylib /Users/bc/libtorch/lib/libc10.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_videoio.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_flann.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib
